226: /// Creates the CoreHostApi static function table.
227: /// All lock acquisitions happen within each accessor call — no guard is ever held
228: /// across a call boundary.
229: pub fn create_host_api() -> CoreHostApi {
230:     extern "C" fn get_field_impl(task_ctx: *mut c_void, key: *const c_char) -> *const c_char {
231:         let task = unsafe { &mut *(task_ctx as *mut Task) };
232:         let key_str = unsafe { CStr::from_ptr(key) }.to_string_lossy().to_string();
233: 
234:         let state = task.state.read();
235:         if let Some(ox_workflow_core::state::FieldValue::String(val)) = state.fields.get(&key_str) {
236:             let cstr = CString::new(val.clone()).unwrap_or_default();
237:             let ptr = cstr.into_raw();
238:             drop(state); // release lock before touching task
239:             task.ffi_arena.push(ptr);
240:             return ptr;
241:         }
242:         std::ptr::null()
243:     }
244: 
245:     extern "C" fn set_field_impl(task_ctx: *mut c_void, key: *const c_char, value: *const c_char) {
246:         let task = unsafe { &mut *(task_ctx as *mut Task) };
247:         let key_str = unsafe { CStr::from_ptr(key) }.to_string_lossy().to_string();
248:         let val_str = unsafe { CStr::from_ptr(value) }.to_string_lossy().to_string();
249: 
250:         let mut state = task.state.write();
251:         state.fields.insert(key_str, ox_workflow_core::state::FieldValue::String(val_str));
252:     }
253: 
254:     extern "C" fn get_field_bytes_impl(task_ctx: *mut c_void, key: *const c_char, len_out: *mut usize) -> *const u8 {
255:         let task = unsafe { &mut *(task_ctx as *mut Task) };
256:         let key_str = unsafe { CStr::from_ptr(key) }.to_string_lossy().to_string();
257: 
258:         let state = task.state.read();
259:         if let Some(ox_workflow_core::state::FieldValue::Bytes(bytes)) = state.fields.get(&key_str) {
260:             let len = bytes.len();
261:             // Allocate a copy on the heap and track it in the bytes arena
262:             let boxed = bytes.clone().into_boxed_slice();
263:             let ptr = boxed.as_ptr();
264:             drop(state);
265:             unsafe { *len_out = len; }
266:             task.ffi_bytes_arena.push(boxed);
267:             return ptr;
268:         }
269:         drop(state);
270:         unsafe { *len_out = 0; }
271:         std::ptr::null()
272:     }
